name: Indy Golf Sims
about: Indy Golf Sims specializes in custom golf simulator installations for both home and business use. They provide tailored solutions to enhance the golfing experience year-round. The company is dedicated to offering the highest quality simulators and expert installation services, serving the Midwest region from their Zionsville location.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom simulator installations tailored to individual needs
Expert installation services for quality assurance
Premium technology partnerships with leading brands
Showroom availability to experience simulators firsthand
Year-round golfing experience regardless of weather

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food services provided
No mention of alcohol services provided

faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but as a fitting center, they likely provide demo clubs or allow you to bring your own equipment.

faq.answer: There's no mention of food or drink services, so BYOB may be allowed, but it's not explicitly stated.

faq.answer: The website doesn't provide specific timing information for 18-hole rounds.

faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, the mention of family-focused solutions and custom installations suggests they can accommodate families with children.
